# HyperPaxeer Documentation

> HyperPaxeer is a high-performance EVM-compatible Cosmos SDK chain with Argus VM, custom PaxSpot precompiles, and network-operated protocols for DEX, perpetuals, launchpad, and routing.

Key facts:
- Mainnet chain ID: 125
- Cosmos chain ID: hyperpax_125-1
- Native token: HPX / hpx, base denomination ahpx, 18 decimals
- RPC: https://public-rpc.paxeer.app/rpc
- Explorer: https://paxscan.io

## Documentation

- [Home](https://github.com/Paxeer-Network/paxeer_network_docs/blob/main/index.mdx): Entry point and protocol overview
- [Current Network Facts](https://github.com/Paxeer-Network/paxeer_network_docs/blob/main/current-network.mdx): Canonical chain IDs, endpoints, binary, denominations, and live precompiles
- [Quick Start](https://github.com/Paxeer-Network/paxeer_network_docs/blob/main/quickstart.mdx): Wallet setup, node setup, contract deployment, verification, and frontend integration
- [Network Configuration](https://github.com/Paxeer-Network/paxeer_network_docs/blob/main/configuration.mdx): wagmi, viem, ethers.js, web3.js, wallet, Hardhat, and Foundry configuration
- [Performance](https://github.com/Paxeer-Network/paxeer_network_docs/blob/main/performance.mdx): Official block timing, validator, RPC, and activity metrics
- [Network Status](https://github.com/Paxeer-Network/paxeer_network_docs/blob/main/network-status.mdx): Validator set, block timing, endpoint, and infrastructure status

## Architecture

- [Architecture Overview](https://github.com/Paxeer-Network/paxeer_network_docs/blob/main/concepts/architecture/overview.mdx): Dual-VM design, consensus, custom precompiles, and module architecture
- [Argus VM](https://github.com/Paxeer-Network/paxeer_network_docs/blob/main/argus-vm.mdx): Argus VM concepts and integration boundaries
- [EVM Extensions](https://github.com/Paxeer-Network/paxeer_network_docs/blob/main/develop/smart-contracts/list-evm-extensions.mdx): Live precompiles and Cosmos EVM extensions
- [x/paxoracle](https://github.com/Paxeer-Network/paxeer_network_docs/blob/main/protocol/modules/paxoracle.mdx): Validator oracle module and submitPrice examples
- [Tokens](https://github.com/Paxeer-Network/paxeer_network_docs/blob/main/protocol/concepts/tokens.mdx): Native token denomination and asset model

## Protocols

- [PaxSpot](https://github.com/Paxeer-Network/paxeer_network_docs/blob/main/paxspot.mdx): Oracle-relative spot exchange architecture
- [PaxSpot Precompiles](https://github.com/Paxeer-Network/paxeer_network_docs/blob/main/paxspot/precompiles.mdx): Solidity and TypeScript reference for 0x901 through 0x904
- [HyperPax DEX](https://github.com/Paxeer-Network/paxeer_network_docs/blob/main/sidiora/dex.mdx): Network-operated v5-ASAMM protocol with production addresses
- [HyperPax Perps](https://github.com/Paxeer-Network/paxeer_network_docs/blob/main/sidiora/perps.mdx): Network-operated perpetual futures protocol with Diamond and facet addresses
- [Sidiora.fun](https://github.com/Paxeer-Network/paxeer_network_docs/blob/main/sidiora/fun.mdx): Launchpad AMM with proxy, implementation, optical, and token addresses
- [Sidiora.ag](https://github.com/Paxeer-Network/paxeer_network_docs/blob/main/sidiora/ag.mdx): Meta-aggregator routing layer and PECOR address book

## API Reference

- [JSON-RPC](https://github.com/Paxeer-Network/paxeer_network_docs/blob/main/rpc.mdx): RPC reference entry point
- [OpenAPI](https://github.com/Paxeer-Network/paxeer_network_docs/blob/main/openapi/index.mdx): OpenAPI reference entry point
- [Tendermint RPC](https://github.com/Paxeer-Network/paxeer_network_docs/blob/main/develop/api/tendermint-rpc.mdx): CometBFT RPC documentation
- [Networks API](https://github.com/Paxeer-Network/paxeer_network_docs/blob/main/develop/api/networks.mdx): Network endpoint reference

## Development

- [Smart Contracts](https://github.com/Paxeer-Network/paxeer_network_docs/blob/main/contracts.mdx): Contract deployment and verification guide
- [Building Apps](https://github.com/Paxeer-Network/paxeer_network_docs/blob/main/app-developers/guides/building-apps.mdx): App developer guide
- [Testing Apps](https://github.com/Paxeer-Network/paxeer_network_docs/blob/main/app-developers/guides/testing-apps.mdx): Testing guide for applications
- [Tools](https://github.com/Paxeer-Network/paxeer_network_docs/blob/main/tools.mdx): Developer tooling overview
- [Examples](https://github.com/Paxeer-Network/paxeer_network_docs/blob/main/examples.mdx): Code examples

## Optional

- [Archived PaxDex](https://github.com/Paxeer-Network/paxeer_network_docs/blob/main/archive/paxdex.mdx): Legacy PaxDex API page retained for redirects and historical reference
- [GitHub Organization](https://github.com/Paxeer-Network): Source repositories for HyperPaxeer and network-operated protocols
